home.title: Find the best price in Cyprus
home.tagline: Compare prices on electronics and appliances from Cypriot stores.

footer.text: TimiCY — Electronics price comparison in Cyprus

category.empty: No products found in this category.

search.minCharsPrompt: Type at least 2 characters to search.

alerts.formDescription: Get notified by email when the price drops to your target.
alerts.successMessage: Your price alert is active — we've emailed you the details.
alerts.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
alerts.invalidPrice: Please enter a price greater than zero.
alerts.unsubscribeDescription: Click the button below to remove your price alert.
alerts.unsubscribeSuccess: You have been unsubscribed. You will no longer receive alerts for this product.
alerts.invalidToken: This link is no longer valid. It may have already been used.
alerts.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
